---
title: "Blog"
author: ""
listing:
  - id: posts_2022
    contents: 
      - "2022/**/index.qmd"
      - "2022/**/index.md"
    sort: "date desc"
    template: ../html/blog/listing.ejs
    categories: true
  - id: posts_2021
    contents: 
      - "2021/**/index.qmd"
      - "2021/**/index.md"
    sort: "date desc"
    template: ../html/blog/listing.ejs

page-layout: full
toc-title: Year
toc-location: right
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
code-tools: false
comments: false
---

## 2022

:::{#posts_2022}
:::

## 2021

:::{#posts_2021}
:::
